name: global-events
description: Global Events MVP - turn a normalized Excel workbook into a searchable event-card catalog.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace server && npm run test --workspace client
